zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Roddam於大約1328年出生在英國諾圖波藍德洛達姆時，她的父親Adam De Roddam32歲，母親Mrs. Adam De Roddam31歲。她於大約1360年與Thomas Umfraville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在英國諾圖波藍德卡素，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Roddam于大约1328年出生在英国諾圖波藍德洛達姆时，她的父亲Adam De Roddam32岁，母亲Mrs. Adam De Roddam31岁。她于大约1360年与Thomas Umfraville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在英国諾圖波藍德卡素，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Roddam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham and Northumberland): habitational name from Roddam in Ilderton (Northumberland). The placename means ‘at the clearings’, from Old English rodum, dative plural form of rod, rodu ‘clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Roddam was born about 1328, in Roddam, Northumberland, England, her father, Adam De Roddam, was 32 and her mother, Mrs. Adam De Roddam, was 31. She married Thomas Umfraville about 1360. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in Castle, Northumberland, England, and was buried in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Roddam est née environ 1328, à Roddam, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Adam De Roddam, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Adam De Roddam, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Umfraville environ 1360. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Roddam um 1328 in Roddam, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam De Roddam 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Adam De Roddam 31. Sie hat um 1360 Thomas Umfraville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in Castle, Northumberland, England und wurde in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Roddam è nata il circa 1328 nel Roddam, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Adam De Roddam, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Adam De Roddam, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Umfraville circa 1360. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel Castle, Northumberland, England, e fu sepolta a Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Roddamが約1328年にイギリスノースウンバーランドロッドアムで生まれた時，父Adam De Roddamは32歳，母Mrs. Adam De Roddamは31歳であった。約1360年にThomas Umfravilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Roddam(이)가 대략 1328년 영국 노르스벌랜드 로다에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam De Roddam(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Adam De Roddam(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1360년 Thomas Umfraville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

mn.Northumberland, England: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Roddam nasceu aproximadamente 1328, em Roddam, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam De Roddam, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Adam De Roddam, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Umfraville aproximadamente 1360. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Roddam родилась около 1328 г. в местности роддам, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam De Roddam было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Adam De Roddam, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Umfraville около 1360 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия и была похоронена в местности нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Roddam nació aproximadamente 1328, en Roddam, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam De Roddam, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Adam De Roddam, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas Umfraville aproximadamente 1360. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
